privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how Promotley ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our service.
privacy.s1_intro: We collect the following types of information:
privacy.s1_item1: Account information: Email address, company name, and other information you provide when registering
privacy.s1_item2: Social media data: When you connect your social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook), we gain access to publicly available data such as posts, engagement, and statistics
privacy.s1_item3: Usage data: Information about how you use our service, including pages visited and features used
privacy.s2_item1: Provide and improve our AI-powered marketing service
privacy.s2_item2: Analyze your social media and generate personalized content suggestions
privacy.s2_item3: Communicate with you about your service and updates
privacy.s2_item4: Ensure the security and integrity of our platform
privacy.s3_intro: We do not share your personal information with third parties without your consent, except:
privacy.s3_item2: To protect our rights and security
privacy.s3_item3: With service providers who help us deliver the service (e.g. cloud hosting)
privacy.s4_body: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. All data is transferred encrypted via HTTPS.
privacy.s5_outro: You can exercise these rights through the settings page in your account profile or by contacting us.
privacy.s6_body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on our website. You can control cookie settings through your browser.
privacy.s7_body: Our service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.s8_body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through a notice on our website.
privacy.s9_intro: If you have questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your personal data, please contact us at:
privacy.s9_contact:
Email: privacy@promotley.se
Address: Promotley, Stockholm, Sweden
privacy.footer: By using Promotley, you agree to this privacy policy and our processing of your personal data as described above.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Promotley! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Promotley's AI-powered marketing platform and related services. By using our service, you agree to these Terms.
terms.s1_intro: Promotley is an AI-powered marketing platform specifically designed for UF companies (Ung Företagsamhet). Our service includes:
terms.s1_item1: Social Media Integration: Connection to Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok to retrieve statistics and analyze your content
terms.s1_item2: AI analysis: Automatic analysis of your posts, engagement, and audience interactions
terms.s1_item3: Content suggestions: AI-generated recommendations to improve your marketing
terms.s1_item4: Insights and reports: Detailed analysis of your social media channels
terms.s2_item2: Provide accurate and current information when registering
terms.s2_item3: Keep your login credentials secure and confidential
terms.s2_item4: Be responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
terms.s2_item5: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
terms.s2_outro: You are responsible for ensuring that your use of Promotley complies with all applicable laws and regulations.
terms.s3_intro: By connecting your social media accounts (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok) to Promotley, you authorize us to:
terms.s3_item1: Retrieve and analyze your public posts and statistics
terms.s3_item2: Collect data about engagement and audience interactions
terms.s3_item3: Use this information to generate AI-based content suggestions
terms.s3_outro: You can disconnect your accounts at any time via the settings page. You are responsible for complying with each platform's terms of service and guidelines.
terms.s4_intro: Promotley's AI service provides content suggestions and marketing recommendations based on your data. Please note that:
terms.s4_item1: AI-generated suggestions are recommendations and not guarantees of results
terms.s4_item2: You are solely responsible for all content you publish based on our suggestions
terms.s4_item3: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of AI-generated suggestions
terms.s4_item4: You should always review and adapt suggestions before publishing
terms.s5_item1: Free plan: Basic features with limited usage
terms.s5_item2: Paid plans: Extended features and higher usage limits
terms.s5_payment_intro: For paid subscriptions the following applies:
terms.s5_item3: Payment is made in advance on a monthly or annual basis
terms.s5_item5: You can cancel your subscription at any time via the settings page
terms.s5_item6: No refunds are given for unused portions of the subscription period
terms.s5_item7: We reserve the right to change prices with at least 30 days' notice
terms.s6_promotley: Promotley's rights: All software, design, text, and other content on Promotley is our or our licensors' property and is protected by copyright laws.
terms.s6_yours: Your rights: You retain all rights to your content and data uploaded to Promotley. However, by using the service you grant us a limited license to use your content to provide and improve the service.
terms.s7_intro: You may not use Promotley to:
terms.s7_item2: Spread harmful, fraudulent, or illegal content
terms.s7_item3: Manipulate or automate use of the service in unauthorized ways
terms.s7_item4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to systems or other users' accounts
terms.s7_item5: Use the service to send spam or unsolicited marketing
terms.s7_item6: Copy, modify, or create derivative works from our software
terms.s7_item7: Compete with Promotley by copying our features or concepts
terms.s8_body: We strive to keep Promotley available 24/7, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We may temporarily suspend the service for maintenance, upgrades, or other reasons. We are not liable for loss or damage resulting from downtime.
terms.s9_intro: To the extent permitted by law:
terms.s9_item1: Promotley is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind
terms.s9_item2: We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
terms.s9_item3: Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the last 12 months
terms.s9_item4: We are not liable for content or actions from third parties (social media platforms)
terms.s10_yours: Your right to terminate: You can close your account at any time through the settings page.
terms.s10_ours: Our right to terminate: We may suspend or close your account if:
terms.s10_item1: You violate these Terms of Service
terms.s10_item2: Your use harms other users or our systems
terms.s10_item3: You do not pay for your subscription
terms.s10_item4: We are required to do so by law
terms.s10_outro: Upon termination, we will delete your data in accordance with our privacy policy.
terms.s11_body: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through a notice on our website at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of the service after changes means you accept the updated Terms.
terms.s12_body: These Terms shall be interpreted under Swedish law. Disputes shall first be resolved through negotiation. If negotiation fails, the dispute shall be settled by a Swedish court.
terms.s13_intro: Since Promotley is designed for UF companies:
terms.s13_item1: We understand that your UF company is time-limited (typically one academic year)
terms.s13_item2: You can export all your data before closing your account
terms.s13_item3: We offer special support to help you maximize your marketing during the UF year
terms.s13_item4: Discounted prices may be available for verified UF companies
terms.s14_intro: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
terms.footer: By using Promotley, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Service and our privacy policy.

demo_page.banner: You are viewing a demo of {{name}}
demo_page.ai_assistant_subtitle: Your personal AI for marketing and content
demo_page.chat_locked: AI Chat is available with your own account.
demo_page.unlock_tools_desc: Create an account to generate content, marketing plans and strategies with AI.
demo_page.calendar_locked: Create and edit posts with your own account.
demo_page.cta_desc: Create your free account and get access to AI-driven marketing tailored for your company.
demo_page.modal_desc: Create a free account to use all features without limitations.
demo_page.limit_message: This is a demo – create an account to unlock all features.
demo_page.chat_message: Hi! I'm your AI marketing assistant. I can help you with strategies, content ideas and analytics for Nordic Hoodies UF. What would you like to know?
demo_page.analysis_summary: Nordic Hoodies UF has a strong foundation with 5.2% engagement on Instagram, well above the average for UF companies (1-2%). TikTok presence is growing quickly but needs more consistent posting.
demo_page.strength_0: High engagement (5.2%) shows a loyal and engaged audience
demo_page.strength_1: Strong visual identity with Scandinavian design
demo_page.strength_2: Unique product niche – locally printed hoodies with Nordic motifs
demo_page.improvement_0: Post 4-5 times/week on TikTok instead of 2
demo_page.improvement_1: Use Instagram Stories daily to show behind-the-scenes
demo_page.improvement_2: Create a content calendar to plan 2 weeks ahead
demo_page.next_step_0: Start a collaboration with a local streetwear influencer
demo_page.next_step_1: Launch a "Design your own hoodie" challenge on TikTok
demo_page.next_step_2: Optimise Instagram bio with a clear CTA and link to webshop
demo_page.radar_summary: Nordic Hoodies has strong growth on Instagram with 5.2% engagement. Focus on collaboration with local skate shops in Malmö and leverage the ongoing "Scandi Streetwear" trend on TikTok.
demo_page.lead_0_desc: Popular skatepark with a shop selling streetwear. Perfect match for your hoodies.
demo_page.lead_0_action: Contact the owner and offer a trial batch with an exclusive Bryggeriet print
demo_page.lead_1_desc: UF influencer with 12k followers who reviews streetwear. Based in Lund.
demo_page.lead_1_action: Send a DM with a collaboration proposal and free hoodies
demo_page.lead_2_desc: Regional UF fair in March with 600+ visitors. Book a stand early.
demo_page.lead_3_desc: Active Facebook group with 8k members interested in streetwear and local design.
demo_page.lead_3_action: Join and share behind-the-scenes content about your prints
demo_page.trend_0_desc: The trend is growing 280% this month on TikTok. Perfect timing for Nordic Hoodies.
demo_page.trend_0_tips: Create a 15-second "outfit of the day" video featuring your hoodies
demo_page.trend_1_desc: Instagram prioritises authentic content. BTS videos from screen printing get 2x more reach.
demo_page.trend_1_tips: Film the printing process with calm lo-fi music and text overlay
demo_page.trend_2_desc: Consumers increasingly value locally produced clothing. Show your Malmö connection.
demo_page.trend_2_tips: Make a post about your hoodies being printed locally in Malmö
demo_page.trend_3_desc: February–March has the highest interest in new spring garments. Perfect for a limited drop.
demo_page.trend_3_tips: Run a "Spring Drop" campaign with countdown and discount code NORDIC10

testimonials.title: What do
testimonials.subtitle: Hundreds of UF companies and startups are already growing with us
testimonials.t1_quote: Promotley created a posting plan that fit our budget perfectly. We went from 300 to 12,000 views in two weeks!
testimonials.t2_quote: I finally know exactly when and how often to post. No more guessing - just a strategy that works!
testimonials.t3_quote: They adapted the strategy to our industry and budget of 400 kr/month. Our engagement has more than doubled!
testimonials.t4_quote: Complete content calendar every week, adapted to how much time we have. Saved us hours of planning!

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need credit card details?
faq.a1: No! You can create your first strategy completely free without entering any payment method. Try Promotely risk-free.
faq.q2: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a2: Absolutely. There are no binding periods. You can cancel your subscription directly from your settings whenever you want.
faq.q3: How quickly do I get results?
faq.a3: Most companies see improved engagement within the first 2-4 weeks after starting to follow their personal strategy from Promotely.
faq.q4: What happens if I change plan?
faq.a4: You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. The change takes effect at the next billing period.
faq.q5: Does Promotely fit my UF company?
faq.a5: Yes! Promotely is designed specifically for UF companies and startups. We adapt the strategy to your budget, industry and available time.

tutorial.step1_content: Here you see a quick overview of your most important metrics – weekly progress, followers, scheduled posts and AI credits.
tutorial.step2_desc: The chart shows how your followers grow per platform. Switch time period to see trends over time.
tutorial.step4_desc: Explore detailed data from your connected social media. See followers, reach and engagement – all in one place.
tutorial.step5_desc: Here you find Chat, Tools, AI Analysis and Sales Radar. Use these to get personal marketing tips and content ideas.
tutorial.step6_desc: Plan and schedule your posts visually. Click on a day to add a post, or let the AI fill the calendar for you.
tutorial.step7_desc: Manage your profile, connect social media, update company information and view your credits.
tutorial.welcome_desc: We help you grow on social media — quickly, smart and easily. Would you like a quick tour?
tutorial.step3_desc: Jump directly to Analytics, AI Chat or Calendar with one click.

app_settings.appearance_desc: Choose between light, dark or system theme
app_settings.social_accounts_desc: Connect your social media to see statistics

tutorial_page.intro_text: Learn how to use Promotley to maximize your marketing.
tutorial_page.section_dashboard_body: The dashboard gives you a quick overview of your most important metrics – followers, engagement, upcoming posts and AI credits.
tutorial_page.section_dashboard_tip1: Connect TikTok under Settings to see real data.
tutorial_page.section_dashboard_tip2: Click a quick link to open an AI tool directly.
tutorial_page.section_analytics_body: The analytics page shows in-depth analysis of your TikTok content – which videos perform best, engagement trends and key insights.
tutorial_page.section_analytics_tip1: Sort the content table by different columns to find patterns.
tutorial_page.section_analytics_tip2: The Most Liked analysis shows which day and video length works best.
tutorial_page.section_ai_body: The AI tools help you create captions, hashtags, campaign strategies and weekly plans tailored for your UF company.
tutorial_page.section_ai_tip1: Fill in company information under Settings for more relevant AI responses.
tutorial_page.section_ai_tip2: Each tool costs 1–3 credits. See your credit balance in the sidebar.
tutorial_page.section_calendar_body: The calendar tool lets you plan and schedule posts visually, and AI can auto-generate a content calendar.
tutorial_page.section_calendar_tip1: Click on a day to add a post directly.
tutorial_page.section_calendar_tip2: Use AI fill to automatically generate a week's content plan.
tutorial_page.section_settings_body: Under Settings you find your profile, account connections, company information and billing information.
tutorial_page.section_settings_tip1: Connect TikTok under the App tab.
tutorial_page.section_settings_tip2: Keep company information up to date for best AI results.

hooks.title: Viral Hook Analysis

hooks.no_data_desc: Connect your TikTok and make sure you have at least 3 videos to see hook analysis.
